nodes.label: MFA router — TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Uses only Python stdlib: hmac
nodes.norm_label: mfa router — totp-based two-factor authentication. uses only python stdlib: hmac

nodes.label: Compute a 6-digit TOTP code for the given Unix timestamp.
nodes.norm_label: compute a 6-digit totp code for the given unix timestamp.

nodes.label: Verify TOTP within ±1 time-step (±30 s) to account for clock skew.
nodes.norm_label: verify totp within ±1 time-step (±30 s) to account for clock skew.

nodes.label: Return whether MFA is currently enabled for the user.
nodes.norm_label: return whether mfa is currently enabled for the user.

nodes.label: Generate a new TOTP secret and persist it (not yet enabled).     The user must c
nodes.norm_label: generate a new totp secret and persist it (not yet enabled).     the user must c

nodes.label: Confirm the TOTP code and enable MFA for the account.
nodes.norm_label: confirm the totp code and enable mfa for the account.

nodes.label: Disable MFA after confirming with the current TOTP code.
nodes.norm_label: disable mfa after confirming with the current totp code.

nodes.label: Scheduled background task: re-evaluates pricing rule and auto-applies if needed.
nodes.norm_label: scheduled background task: re-evaluates pricing rule and auto-applies if needed.

nodes.label: Background task: generates 12-20 fake competitors and saves them to DB.
nodes.norm_label: background task: generates 12-20 fake competitors and saves them to db.

nodes.label: Return 'YYYY-MM' string for n months before the current month.
nodes.norm_label: return 'yyyy-mm' string for n months before the current month.
